cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem. So Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so I need to determine which one is correct. First, let's clarify the timeline. If the flight is booked for tomorrow, that means today is the day before the flight. So if the flight is on July 29, 2002, then today must be July 28, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today. So, one week before July 28, 2002. To find one week ago, we need to subtract seven days from July 28, 2002. Let me count the days backwards. Starting from July 28: - July 28 minus 1 day is July 27 - July 28 minus 2 days is July 26 - July 28 minus 3 days is July 25 - July 28 minus 4 days is July 24 - July 28 minus 5 days is July 23 - July 28 minus 6 days is July 22 - July 28 minus 7 days is July 21, 2002 So, one week before July 28 is July 21, 2002. Now, converting that into MM/DD/YYYY format. July is the 7th month, so the date would be 07/21/2002. Let me check the options given. Looking at the options: (A) 08/18/2002 – August, which is later in the year, so not correct. (B) 10/21/2002 – October, way later. (C) 07/20/2002 – July 20, but we calculated July 21. (D) 10/17/2002 – October again. (E) 07/21/2002 – This matches our calculation. (F) 11/21/2001 – November of the previous year, which is way too far back.
